title: Nether Villager Merchant
description: Adds a Nether merchant to the Crimson Forest, selling new Piglin Brute armor
body:
**This mod adds a new villager to the Nether.**

The Nether Merchant spawns exclusively in a house found in the Crimson Forest biome. You can also summon him anywhere by placing his Traderblock Workstation (found in every Nether Merchant house) next to a jobless villager.

**Nether Merchant:**

- The villager only trades with gold.
- The merchant transforms dangerous Piglin Brutes into armor and sells it to the player.
- He also converts the standard Piglin Brute Gold Axe into a double-sided version.
![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/314b0f1f27208e2ab673a5f20129316a17de6ef6.jpeg)

Piglin Brute Armor:

- Wearing the full set grants the player the new Brute Fury effect, increasing damage and granting resistance.
![Brute Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a265d79d401925a6d77498794d1a95709c791f3.jpeg)

**Double Golden Axe:**

- A stronger version of the regular Piglin Brute Gold Axe, dealing more damage and faster hit speed. It can also be used as a normal axe tool.



You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
